lineage.Process: CreateFeatureclass E:\Heard_Island Circle_domain Polygon # No No "PROJCS["Heard_Island_icepack",GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Lambert_Azimuthal_Equal_Area"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",0.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",73.517089],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",-53.104236],UNIT["Meter",1.0]];-12747300 -12737000 353298316.299961;-100000 10000;-100000 10000;0.001;0.001;0.001;IsHighPrecision" # 0 0 0 # "Same as template"
